scope: bounded real-data H1a P1 learning qualification; not full H1a and no H1b-H6

prerequisites.periodic_graph: complete 8A periodic radius multigraph with nonzero self images
prerequisites.lattice_path: train-standardized log-volume residual and five-dimensional whitened log shape

training.precision: bf16 learned layers with FP32 probability and geometry kernels

decision_rule: Failure stops at H1a and is attributed by head and sampler diagnostics. Passing permits a separately frozen longer H1a P1 experiment only; it does not authorize H1b, tensor conditioning, oracle, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
